uplink.description: SOIL + BME blocks (synthetic in-bounds; covers soil-monitor + climate required keys)
uplink._note: byte[0]=0x03 enables SOIL(bit0)+BME(bit1). Upstream decodeUplink returns {valv:0,leak:0,bat:72,e25:25,ec:1350,temp:20,vwc:35,airTemp:22.35,airHum:60.5,airPres:101325}. Mapped: vwc->soil.moisture, temp->soil.temperature, ec 1350 uS/cm /1000->soil.ec 1.35 dS/m, e25->soilE25 extra, airTemp->air.temperature, airHum->air.relativeHumidity, airPres 101325 Pa /100->air.pressure 1013.25 hPa, bat percent->batteryPercent, valv->valveOpen, leak->water.leak.

uplink.description: SOIL only with negative soil temperature and valve+leak flags set (synthetic in-bounds)
uplink._note: byte[0]=0xC1 enables valv(bit7)+leak(bit6)+SOIL(bit0). Upstream returns {valv:1,leak:1,bat:55,e25:18,ec:25,temp:-5.5,vwc:12} for soil-temp bytes 0xFDDA (signed -550, /100). ec 25 uS/cm /1000->soil.ec 0.025 dS/m.

uplink.description: All optional blocks present: SOIL+BME+OPT+PULSE+second SOIL+PRESSURE+LEAF (synthetic in-bounds)
uplink._note: byte[0]=0x3F enables bits 0-5; trailing set1=0x02 enables LEAF. Upstream returns {valv:0,leak:0,bat:80,e25:25,ec:10,temp:15,vwc:40,airTemp:18.5,airHum:70,airPres:101000,lux:500,pulse:250,e25_1:22,ec_1:8,temp_1:16,vwc_1:38,press:90,leafHum:85,leafTemp:17}. Blocks decode in upstream wire order SOIL,BME,OPT,PULSE,SOIL_1,PRESSURE. Second soil probe -> soil1* extras; lux->air.lightIntensity; press analog channel->pressureChannel extra; leaf->leaf* extras.

uplink.description: BME present with pressure sentinel suppressed (raw 15536 == 65536 Pa)
uplink._note: airPres raw 0x3CB0 (15536) + 50000 = 65536 Pa is upstream's no-reading sentinel; upstream omits airPres and so does this codec. air.pressure absent here.

uplink.description: Payload too short (fewer than 2 bytes) returns an error
uplink._note: Length guard. byte[0] flags + byte[1] battery are always required; upstream would read undefined bytes and produce NaN.

uplink.description: SOIL flag set but block truncated returns an error
uplink._note: byte[0]=0x01 claims an 8-byte SOIL block but only 2 block bytes follow; guarded. Upstream would slice past the array and emit NaN/partial values.
